ACC Clash Issues

QA Live 1:24

Pull issues from Autodesk Construction Cloud and resolve them in Revit.

What it does

ACC Clash Issues is part of the QA set in BUILD MEP. Pull issues from Autodesk Construction Cloud and resolve them in Revit. The video above shows the workflow end-to-end against a sample model.

How it works

Auto-generated by from data/demos.json. See Demo Page Skill for the contract.
